name: envpkt-skills
description: Skills for credential lifecycle and fleet management with envpkt

plugins.name: envpkt
plugins.description: Help developers use envpkt for credential management — CLI usage, envpkt.toml configuration, library API, boot patterns, MCP server integration, and fleet health monitoring

plugins.name: ts-builds-template
plugins.description: Guide for bootstrapping new TypeScript libraries from the ts-builds-template. Use when creating a new npm package from this template, customizing the template for a new project, or understanding the template's project structure and dev workflow.
